summary: VibeSDK platform testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly. The Cloudflare Workers backend runs through Vite dev server on port 3000 with FastAPI reverse proxy on port 8001.
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - tested public endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: VibeSDK is a Cloudflare Workers project (NOT standard React+FastAPI). Frontend and backend both run through Vite dev server on port 3000 using Cloudflare Vite plugin. Port 8001 is FastAPI reverse proxy forwarding to port 3000. Preview URL: https://vibe-sdk-docker.preview.emergentagent.com. All tested features working: /api/capabilities (200), /api/status (200), /api/auth/profile (401 when unauthenticated), /api/auth/providers (200), /api/apps/public (200). UI elements verified: main prompt, Sign In button with modal, Deploy/Fork buttons, theme toggle (Light/Dark/System), text input.
